name: Rebalance sections
description: Redraw section boundaries, support roles, and workload assumptions around the actual cover flow so the peak period stops collapsing into uneven pressure.
source_ref: core-v2: align roles and coverage to the true demand pattern instead of legacy sectioning
entry_conditions: Sections overload unevenly while other capacity sits underused.
The team can identify the venue's real peak windows, service mix, and pressure points.
contraindications: Do not redraw sections without evidence from actual cover flow and support demands.
Do not use static fairness logic when the venue's traffic pattern is structurally uneven.
proof_of_completion: Section map reflects actual guest flow and support load, not habit.
Primary and support assignments are visible before the peak window starts.
Rebalance triggers are defined for overload moments.
